comments: Common house Martin - white rump visible
Male found yesterday. Solid black throat, plain brownish grey back and pale underparts. Slightly smaller and more slender than the Fieldfares.

(pretty sure I saw a Wagtail species flying away from Jeffrey Street over the railway yards, but couldn't see it well enough to pin down an exact type.  Didn't see or hear any other wagtails during my 2-3 day Edinburgh stay, so 'wagtail sp.' will have to do for now).
locName: Railway Hub (as seen from Jeffrey Street)

comments: Originally found yesterday. 2nd CY feeding in sheep field.
Continuing bird - smaller than fieldfare, with brownish grey back, yellow bill, pale belly and black face & throat. With other thrushes in field north of farm entrance
